creator: jhein@symmetricom.com
text:
Attached is a refreshed patch.

It is slightly different than Matthias Andree's patch:
 - refresh against Makefile:1.50 instead of 1.49
 - does not remove hgweb.fcgi and hgweb.wsgi
 - use INSTALL_DATA (more appropriate than INSTALL_MAN
    even though the effect is the same)
 - fix broken link in pkg-message.in rather than just removing it

See also thread starting:
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/cvs-ports/2010-August/199961.html
